prompt_text:
### Demographics: 49-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 7 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Major Depressive Disorder
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~11.2 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Insulin Detemir 15units once daily; Olanzapine (10 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 58.4 kg; Height 150.1 cm; BMI 25.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 127/75 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.4%; 9 months ago 10.0%; 6 months ago 10.5%; 3 months ago 11.0%; current 10.2%), FPG (12 months ago 255mg/dL; 9 months ago 286mg/dL; 6 months ago 303mg/dL; 3 months ago 320mg/dL; current 237mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 58.9kg; 9 months ago 58.3kg; 6 months ago 56.8kg; 3 months ago 57.3kg; current 58.4kg), Height (12 months ago 150.1cm; 9 months ago 150.1cm; 6 months ago 150.1cm; 3 months ago 150.1cm; current 150.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 25.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 127mmHg; 9 months ago 126mmHg; 6 months ago 130mmHg; 3 months ago 129mmHg; current 127mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 75mmHg; 9 months ago 74mmHg; 6 months ago 75mmHg; 3 months ago 75mmHg; current 75mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 47U/L; 9 months ago 48U/L; 6 months ago 55U/L; 3 months ago 53U/L; current 52U/L), AST (12 months ago 84U/L; 9 months ago 84U/L; 6 months ago 86U/L; 3 months ago 92U/L; current 91U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 30mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 24mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 22mL/min/1.73m²; current 23mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 450mg/g; 9 months ago 496mg/g; 6 months ago 555mg/g; 3 months ago 560mg/g; current 672mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 82mg/dL; 9 months ago 85mg/dL; 6 months ago 79mg/dL; 3 months ago 83mg/dL; current 81mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 41mg/dL; 9 months ago 42mg/dL; 6 months ago 41mg/dL; 3 months ago 42mg/dL; current 43mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 148mg/dL; 9 months ago 135mg/dL; 6 months ago 149mg/dL; 3 months ago 149mg/dL; current 142mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.2g/dL; current 11.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
